title: Light Peppery Middle Eastern Rainbow Trout Kebabs
description: A flavorful and healthy dish featuring rainbow trout, perfect for a light lunch or dinner, with a peppery kick to help cure hangovers
instructions: Preheat grill to medium high heat
In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, olive oil, garlic, sumac, paprika, and black pepper
Add the rainbow trout cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the marinated trout cubes onto skewers, leaving a little space between each piece
Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the fish is cooked through
Serve the kebabs hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley
Serve with a side of dum or other Middle Eastern flatbread
Refrigerate any leftovers promptly and consume within a day
